content: Google Fonts performance: add <link rel='preconnect' href='https://fonts.googleapis.com'> and <link rel='preconnect' href='https://fonts.gstatic.com' crossorigin> BEFORE the fonts stylesheet link. Only load weights that are used — remove 300, 500 from Poppins (UI-SPEC says only 400 and 600). Use &display=swap in URL. Consider font-display: optional for lowest CLS risk. For Playfair Display: load 700 and 700i only per UI-SPEC.
